## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature or pipeline capability
- [ ] Documentation

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? Commands, sample run dir, schema validation, etc. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are scoped to the stated goal (no unrelated edits)
- [ ] Docs or `AGENTS.md` updated if behavior or paths changed
- [ ] No secrets or `.intermediate/` artifacts committed
